---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability for Tessellate
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement.

## Problem or Use Case

What workflow would this help with?

## Proposed Solution

How would you like it to work?

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any other approaches you considered.

## Privacy / Client-Side Considerations

Does this require any data to leave the browser? If so, explain why.

## Additional Context

Add mockups, examples, or related links if useful.
